www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

We want you to continuously think about your WHY.
During the next two days…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 14 of 55 --

Your WHAT is pretty simple:
You want to create scalable offers that work on cold traffic.
New offers…
Dead offers that you revive…
Current offers that you tweak.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 15 of 55 --

And one of the reasons “why” is because you want to
make more money.
Which is totally cool.
We’re all in business to make money.
This holds true for business owners and freelancers alike.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 16 of 55 --

But that’s not the WHY we’re talking about.
We want you to go deeper.
We want you to answer the question of WHY you want to make
more money and grow your business in the first place.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 17 of 55 --

Ø 	To provide a comfortable life for yourself and your family?
Ø 	To travel the world?
Ø 	To change the world?
Ø 	To give back?
Ø 	To fund a big idea?
Ø 	To live a life of unadulterated hedonism and luxury?
Ø 	To retire in five years from now and never work another day as
long as you live?
What’s Your WHY?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 18 of 55 --

There’s no right answer…
It all comes down to you.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 19 of 55 --

STEFAN GEORGI
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 20 of 55 --

So here’s my WHAT:
I’m a direct response copywriter whose writing has grossed over
$600MM in revenue (and counting).
I teach and train copy through the Copy Accelerator Mastermind…
And I’m an entrepreneur who’s partnered in several businesses
and ventures.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 21 of 55 --

I’m also a devoted husband and a proud father.
I love reading history, biographies, and fiction…
And I enjoy traveling, great meals, and being in nature.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 22 of 55 --

That’s what I do…
But here’s my “WHY”…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 23 of 55 --

My selfish why is that I love comfort. The more money I have,
the more comfortable my life is.
In terms of travel, cars, my house, my clothes, and everything else.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 24 of 55 --

My unselfish why is my family. I want to provide the most
comfortable life imaginable for my wife Laura and my daughter Eden.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 25 of 55 --

But as weird as this is to admit…
I have an even deeper WHY...
One that has been with me the longest.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 26 of 55 --

My deepest WHY is to impact the lives of
as many people as I possibly can.
I want to show folks that there is a better way…
I want to show them that they can live the type of life that
most people say is “impossible”…
I want to show them that they can leverage their God-given talents,
do work they truly love, and still make an incredible living as a result.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 27 of 55 --

To that end…
I own a Customer Service Center that employs 60+ people.
I employ another 10+ people through my agency.
I provide a good monthly income for another 20+ freelancers
in areas like design, dev, copy, etc.
(and nobody ever quits)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 28 of 55 --

I’m also in the process of finalizing a deal with the place I went
to college (UWF)…
Where I’ll be providing two students with full scholarships
(tuition + room & board) each year…
One student in the Business School and one in the Humanities
School…
With the scholarships going to those students that have shown an
outstanding ability to use critical thinking to solve problems.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 29 of 55 --

And I’m mentoring “at-risk” high school students in Las Vegas…
And teaching them about entrepreneurship, through the
Junior Achievers League of Southern Nevada.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 30 of 55 --

This is the kind of stuff I find to be the most rewarding...
And it’s why I’m standing in front of you guys today…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 31 of 55 --

Because whether you’re a freelance copywriter who wants to
grow your career, make more money, and live a better life…
Or you’re a business owner who wants to see their company
continue to grow and scale…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 32 of 55 --

The reason I do Copy Accelerator...
Is because I want to help you achieve those things…
And not just so you can make more money…
But so that you can live out your WHY too.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 33 of 55 --

JUSTIN GOFF
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 34 of 55 --

Who I am and what I’ve done…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 35 of 55 --

I started dabbling with making websites in college
to pay off a $1200 gambling debt I had.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 36 of 55 --

The websites never amounted to anything, but this led me to
affiliate marketing and copywriting.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 37 of 55 --

The first few years I barely scraped by - I was making $30k a year
and living in an apartment in Columbus that cost $250 a month.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 38 of 55 --

Since then I’ve built four multi-million dollar businesses
including my biggest, Patriot Health Alliance –
which was a supplement company I built with Allen & Erin Baler
we grew that to $23 million a year before I sold my stake
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 39 of 55 --

Now-a-days, I specialize in making offers convert on cold traffic
To put that in perspective you can get very rich simply by having
1 offer work on cold traffic
I’ve made over 14 offers convert on cold traffic
(this includes my own offers + offers I have written for clients)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 40 of 55 --

My WHY for myself
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 41 of 55 --

Freedom - the ability to do what I want, work when I want,
and to make a living doing something I truly enjoy.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

I am a marketing nerd at heart.
I read marketing and psychology books for FUN.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

I’ve realized in the last year that I truly

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Seeing the growth of the men and women in the

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

I also mentor 3 up-and-coming entrepreneurs
all of them are here - Tanner, Alec and Blake
Seeing them go from working normal jobs to now making a living
writing emails and working online has been pretty incredible.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

If you read my emails, you know I am a HUGE dog lover.
I like dogs more than I like most people.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 47 of 55 --

This is my doggie George he’s a big ole’ 165 lb 	baby.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 48 of 55 --

One of my driving forces for making more money is to

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 49 of 55 --

Last 	year I was able to donate nearly $30,000
to two of my favorite dog rescues.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 50 of 55 --

So that’s a little about me and about why I do this...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
